name: revit_import_schedules_from_excel
description: Imports parameter updates from a bidirectional Excel export back into Revit schedules and supported standard tables.

input_path.description: Path to an .xlsx file previously exported in bidirectional mode

worksheet_names.description: Optional subset of worksheets to import; omit to require UI selection

notes: Only files exported by this add-in in bidirectional mode are importable. Read-only Revit parameters cannot be updated.
